src: Support for iStoreOS in Amlogic, Rockchip and Allwinner boxes. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3566, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.
ja: Amlogic・Rockchip・AllwinnerボックスでのiStoreOSサポート。a311d、s922x、s905x3、s905x2、s912、s905d、s905x、s905w、s905、s905l、rk3588、rk3568、rk3566、rk3399、rk3328、h6などに対応。
